title: Welcome
text:
Hello, Quarto + Python 👋
下面演示 PySpark 与 pandas 的简单输出。
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession spark = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate() print(“PySpark version:”, spark.version) df = spark.createDataFrame([(1,“A”),(2,“B”),(3,“C”)], [“id”,“label”]) df.show()
import pandas as pd import numpy as np pdf = pd.DataFrame({“x”: np.arange(6), “y”: np.arange(6)**2}) pdf
```bash cat > about.qmd << ‘EOF’ — title: “About” —
import platform, psutil print(“OS:”, platform.system(), platform.release()) print(“Python:”, platform.python_version()) mem = psutil.virtual_memory() print(“Total Memory (MB):”, round(mem.total/1024**2, 2))
```bash
quarto render
quarto publish gh-pages
